title: englerina ochroleuca
intro: Englerina ochroleuca, a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae, is a tropical plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Englerina ochroleuca include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an analgesic. Herbal preparations of Englerina ochroleuca can be made through infusion or decoction, where the leaves are typically used in the form of a tea or a tincture.
